vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection in Search API
vulnerabilities.description: The 'query' parameter of the /api/v1/search endpoint does not properly sanitize user inputs, allowing SQL queries to be run directly on the database.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement parameterized queries or use a secure ORM framework to sanitize user inputs.

vulnerabilities.title: Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA)
vulnerabilities.description: Users can access metadata of other accounts by modifying the 'account_id' parameter in /api/v1/accounts/{id} without active verification checks.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify authorization tokens against the requested object ownership before serving data.

vulnerabilities.title: Weak JWT Signature Verification
vulnerabilities.description: The authentication server accepts JWT tokens with the signature algorithm set to 'none', bypassing authentication checks.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Enforce strict signature validation using RS256/HS256 and reject tokens containing algorithm parameter set to 'none'.
